data.title: Music Discovery and Personalization
data.description: Central focus on user-driven music discovery through personalized playlists.

data.title: Cross-Platform Experience
data.description: Seamless access to Spotify across various devices and operating systems.

data.title: Collaborative Playlists
data.description: Enables users to create and share playlists with friends.

data.title: High-Quality Streaming
data.description: Focus on delivering superior audio quality options to users.
data.technical_spec: Multiple streaming quality settings, lossless audio support.

data.title: Artist and Podcaster Platform
data.description: Support for artist and podcaster tools to connect directly with their audience.
data.technical_spec: Analytics tools for artists, podcaster publications.
